title: Devops Engineer
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Guides DevOps teams on speed of delivery, improving quality/security of code, and optimizing processes
  • Mentors and coaches the technical team
  • Is hands on and engages in coding to help the team to develop his solution and solve all surfacing problems at hand Identifies and removes technical impediments
  • Constantly looks for better ways of solving technical problems and designs the solution, not afraid of challenging the status quo
  • Provides the team a roadmap for implementing software engineering practices for higher code quality
  • Identifies bottlenecks in coding development and deployment processes
  • Leads planning delivery time, code quality, and processes efficiency improvement projects
  • Executes on plan by building coding standardizations and automating processes for the organization
  • Leads knowledge growth effort of platform configuration management and troubleshooting
  • Leads DevOps team in delivering consistent and holistic solution to the organization
  • Collaborates with the rest of DevOps team to deliver consistent and holistic solution to the organization
  • Creates an inspiring team environment with an open communication culture to set clear goals, delegate tasks and set deadlines
  • Monitors team performance and report on metrics

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related quantitative discipline
  • Experience as a DevOps or SRE Lead on a cross-functional agile team
  • Minimum 9 years of IT Engineering experience
  • Excellent coding and scripting skills (Bash, Perl) and experience with implementing high-scale cloud architectures using modern, cloud-based container platforms (PaaS/SaaS)
  • In-depth knowledge of deployment automation solutions (i.e. Puppet, Chef, Ansible)
  • Knowledge of cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure) and cluster management tools like Kubernetes
  • Experience with containers such as Docker, OpenShift and continuous integration and related tools such as Jenkins, Hudson, Maven, Ant, Git, Sonar, etc.
  • Experience in Agile Development, with specific Solution Architect (or similar) experience preferred
  • Understands relationship with Product Owner, Scrum Master, Design Lead and rest of technical team. Experience managing technical priorities within the Backlog
  • Strong communication skills with ability to align the organization on complex technical decisions
  • Active coach and mentor whose goals are to grow and maximize the team’s potential

postedCompany.description: OPTIMUM SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD is Singapore-headquartered IT Outsourcing firm specialising in Software Engineering, Application Development & Support, IT Infrastructure Management. Having started in March 1997, we have grown to one of the largest IT Services firms in Singapore providing Digital Transformation Services to its clients.
postedCompany.name: OPTIMUM SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
